caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and black baseball cap with a circular logo, and large black headphones sits in a sound-dampened room with dark, ribbed acoustic panels in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm labeled "Blue". Throughout the sequence, the man rests his head back and tilts it slightly while holding the side of his headphones with his left hand. His right arm is relaxed at his side, revealing a tattoo on his upper arm. As the scene progresses, he shifts his gaze and head position slightly to the left, looking away from the microphone while maintaining his contemplative posture. The environment remains static, with no other people or text visible, focusing entirely on the man's subtle movements.
